description_long: This mushroom object features a thick, bulbous stem and a broad, domed cap with a matte, dark brown to black coloration. The cap appears irregular and slightly angular, with a rough, uneven surface and a margin that is subtly curved. The stem is robust and tapers slightly toward the base, displaying a gradient of dark brown hues with some lighter, reddish undertones. The surface texture of both the cap and stem is matte and somewhat rough, lacking any visible gloss or shine. No gills are visible beneath the cap, and the underside appears to be continuous with the stem. The object has a natural, organic appearance, resembling a wild mushroom that might be found in shaded, urban green spaces.
description: A dark, thick-stemmed mushroom with a broad, irregular cap and a matte, rough surface. The cap and stem are both dark brown to black, with subtle color gradients and no visible gills.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mushroom's broad, domed cap and thick stem, with the cap's irregular, angular surface most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the stem's taper and the cap's overhang, with some lighter brown and reddish tones visible on the stem.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view reveals the underside of the cap and the stem's attachment, with no visible gills and a continuous surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the cap's angularity and the stem's curvature, with more of the stem's color gradient visible.
